memoryArtifacts.description: Joanna Thake was a great-grand-mother (4th maternal) of John "Jonny Appleseed" Chapman, American pioneer nurseryman who introduced apple trees to large parts of Pennsylvania, Ohio, Indiana, and Illino …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Thake於1606年2月2日之前出生在英國時，她的父親William Thake34歲，母親Joane Wood31歲。她於1632年10月18日與Samuel Richardson在英國賀特福爾格亞特 霍亞德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1666年6月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Thake于1606年2月2日之前出生在英国时，她的父亲William Thake34岁，母亲Joane Wood31岁。她于1632年10月18日与Samuel Richardson在英国賀特福爾格亞特 霍亞德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1666年6月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Thake was born before 2 February 1606, in England, her father, William Thake, was 34 and her mother, Joane Wood, was 31. She married Samuel Richardson on 18 October 1632, in Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 June 1666, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Thake est née avant 2 février 1606, à Angleterre, son père, William Thake, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joane Wood, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Richardson le 18 octobre 1632, à Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1666, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Thake vor 2. Februar 1606 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Thake 34 und ihre Mutter Joane Wood 31. Sie hat am 18. Oktober 1632 in Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, England Samuel Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1666 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Thake è nata il prima del 2 febbraio 1606 nel England, sua padre, William Thake, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joane Wood, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Richardson il 18 ottobre 1632, nel Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 giugno 1666, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークワイ
ja.lifeSummary: Joane Thakeが1606年2月2日以前にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Thakeは34歳，母Joane Woodは31歳であった。1632年10月18日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト ホールメアドでSamuel Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1666年6月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Joane Thake(이)가 1606년 2월 2일 이전 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Thake(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Wood(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1632년 10월 18일 영국 허트퍼드실르 그리트 호미드에서 Samuel Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1666년 6월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.before 2 February 1606–20 JUN 1666: antes 2 de fevereiro de 1606–20 de junho de 1666
pt.of Woburn, Mddx., Ma: Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Thake nasceu antes 2 de fevereiro de 1606, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Thake, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joane Wood, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Samuel Richardson em 18 de outubro de 1632, em Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1666, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Thake родилась перед 2 февраль 1606 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Thake было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joane Wood, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Samuel Richardson 18 октября 1632 г. в местности грит хаурмид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 июня 1666 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Thake nació antes de 2 de febrero de 1606, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Thake, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joane Wood, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Samuel Richardson el 18 de octubre de 1632, en Great Hormead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de junio de 1666, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
